options.text: Can you take over my tasks while I'm on business trip?
How many days will you be on business trip?
I'll take care of all the work while you're away.
What's your plan for handling emergencies?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"Can you take over my tasks while I'm on business trip?"直接询问经理是否能接手工作。干扰项"How many days will you be on business trip?"问的是出差的时间，而不是工作接手的问题，"I'll take care of all the work while you're away."表达了自己会处理工作，这不是询问经理的提问,"What's your plan for handling emergencies?"问的是紧急情况的处理方案，而不是工作接手的问题。
content.scenarioHint: 员工提出请求，经理作为服务方回应

options.text: Can you take over my tasks for the next week?
What are you doing next week?
I'll be out next week, so can you buy me a new laptop?
Do you have any plans for next week?

content.explanation: 答案解析：正确答案"Can you take over my tasks for the next week?"是最合适的提问，因为它明确地询问经理是否能接手员工的任务。其他选项不正确，因为它们没有明确地询问任务接手的问题或询问了不相关的问题。
content.scenarioHint: 员工提出请求，经理作为服务方回应

options.text: Of course. Can you share the template and deadline reminders?
I'm not sure I can do it right.
I'll do it, but I need a bonus.

content.explanation: 正确答案接受任务并请求必要资料，体现专业性和主动性。选项2缺乏信心，选项3推卸责任，选项4索要报酬，都不符合职场交接的协作文化。
content.speakerText: I'm leaving for a two-week trip. Can you manage the weekly reports while I'm away?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要出差两周，我走期间你能负责每周的报告吗？
